focus: [D5-A2/D5] model the design manifest on the Gate-3 spec-folder pass-through: manifest present plus sk-design loaded plus register set, or ASK before dispatch

graphEvents.label: Can design dispatch use the same present-or-ASK pass-through shape as Gate-3 spec-folder delegation?
All three cli-* skills already require spec-folder pass-through or ASK before non-interactive delegation
sk-design already has context manifest, register-first gate, loaded-file checklist, proof fields, and deterministic proof checks
cli-opencode has a design/UI scaffold, but it is template-local and still permits an unknown register at dispatch time
Agent I/O is optional-advisory, so it cannot be the mandatory design manifest carrier
Design/UI/Open Design-adjacent CLI dispatches require DESIGN_DISPATCH_MANIFEST v1 before launching the child
A pre-dispatch design manifest must carry Brand or Product; otherwise the caller asks before non-interactive dispatch
Agent I/O may carry a design-manifest digest but must not be the hard enforcement authority under its current optional-advisory contract

label: All three cli-* skills already require spec-folder pass-through or ASK before non-interactive delegation
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for static CLI-skill lint and prompt-replay fixtures; ADVISORY for semantic design-adjacent classification.

label: sk-design already has context manifest, register-first gate, loaded-file checklist, proof fields, and deterministic proof checks
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for schema fields, loaded-file witnesses, registry-mode validation, and proof-check execution; ADVISORY for visual quality.

label: cli-opencode has a design/UI scaffold, but it is template-local and still permits an unknown register at dispatch time
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for CLI-family parity and rejecting register=unknown in pre-dispatch manifests; ADVISORY for resolving genuinely ambiguous register prompts.

label: Agent I/O is optional-advisory, so it cannot be the mandatory design manifest carrier
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE that absence cannot block under current Agent I/O; ADVISORY if used only as auxiliary evidence.

label: Design/UI/Open Design-adjacent CLI dispatches require DESIGN_DISPATCH_MANIFEST v1 before launching the child
A pre-dispatch design manifest must carry Brand or Product; otherwise the caller asks before non-interactive dispatch
Agent I/O may carry a design-manifest digest but must not be the hard enforcement authority under its current optional-advisory contract

direction: Make Agent I/O the sole design manifest carrier
reason: The current Agent I/O contract explicitly makes absence non-blocking and evidence validation advisory, so it cannot implement the present-or-ASK gate.
